name: Gem of True Sight
description: Not one thrall creature of the depths, Nor spirit bound in drowning's keep, Nor Maelrawn the Tentacular, Shall rest till seas, gem comes to sleep.

abilities.name: Reveal
abilities.description: Reveals and exposes enemy units and wards within the target area for a while. Cooldown: 12. Mana Cost: 0. Cast Range: 300. Radius: 300. Duration: 4. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5.

abilities.name: True Sight
abilities.description: Reveals nearby invisible enemy units and wards, rendering them visible to the owner and their team. Reveal Radius: 900. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5.

abilities.name: Everlasting
abilities.description: While on the ground, the gem provides flying vision around itself to the last team that dropped it. Vision Radius: 300.
